tagline: Back to strong. Back to life.
descriptor: 22 Strong Foundation gives veterans, underprivileged youth, and cancer survivors in Orange County access to Better in 90 — a 90-day, one-to-one recovery program, at no cost to eligible participants.
address: 4120 Birch St, Suite 106, Newport Beach, CA 92660

monthly.22: $22 a month — one for the 22 — helps keep recovery care free for the veterans, young athletes, and cancer survivors we serve.
monthly.default: Your monthly gift helps keep recovery care free for the people we serve — every month.

oneTime.default: Your gift helps make recovery care accessible to people who need it.
